business_ideas.idea: Dan Gilbert's barbell: boring profitable mortgage biz funds wild bets in Detroit.
Quicken Loans: built largest independent mortgage lender through culture and tech.
Dictionary.com: acquire undervalued domain and expand via licensing and games.
StockX: create stock market for sneakers and watches as collectibles.
Shinola: luxury watches and hotel in Detroit as part of revitalization play.
Buy derelict downtown Detroit real estate and revitalize via mixed-use development.
Franchise business model for DTC brands entering new geographies with local operators.

predictions.text: Dan Gilbert will continue saying yes to interesting ideas over pure financial returns.
Quicken Loans IPO market cap reached $46B, validating Gilbert's mortgage strategy.
Gilbert will donate most of his wealth to causes, not hoard it like traditional billionaires.
